sectionSubtitle: HeadyOS is designed from the ground up for cross-platform deployment. The same agent runtime, the same CSL gate engine, the same φ-scaled scheduler — everywhere.

platforms.name: Web Browser
platforms.description: HeadyOS compiles to WebAssembly (WASM) via Emscripten, enabling full agent runtime execution inside any modern browser. The WASM build includes the CSL gate engine, local vector store, and φ-scaled scheduler — no server required for core agent operations. Ideal for privacy-first web applications and offline-capable progressive web apps.

platforms.name: Linux x86 / ARM
platforms.description: The primary production deployment target. HeadyOS on Linux supports both x86-64 and ARM64 architectures, including AWS Graviton, Ampere Altra, and standard Intel/AMD server hardware. Distributed as a systemd service, Docker container, or standalone Bun binary. Includes full pgvector integration, Redis sidecar, and Prometheus metrics export.

platforms.name: macOS
platforms.description: Native macOS support for Apple Silicon (M1/M2/M3/M4) and Intel Macs. The macOS build leverages Metal GPU acceleration for local model inference via llama.cpp, the Secure Enclave for PQC key storage, and CoreML for vision and speech models. Distributed as a signed and notarized .dmg installer and a Homebrew formula.

minRequirements.cpu: Apple M1 or Intel Core i5 (2019+)

platforms.name: Windows
platforms.description: HeadyOS on Windows runs as a native Win64 application built with Bun, with CUDA GPU acceleration support for NVIDIA GPUs and DirectML for AMD/Intel GPUs. Includes a system tray agent manager, Windows Credential Manager integration for PQC key storage, and WSL2 compatibility mode for Linux-native workloads.

platforms.name: Android
platforms.description: HeadyOS for Android brings the full companion agent experience to smartphones and tablets. The Android build uses NNAPI for hardware-accelerated local inference on Qualcomm Snapdragon NPUs and MediaTek APUs, and integrates with Android Keystore for PQC-secured key material. Persistent agent state survives app background kills via a foreground service.

minRequirements.cpu: Snapdragon 7 Gen 1 / MediaTek Dimensity 8100 or equivalent

platforms.name: iOS
platforms.description: HeadyOS for iOS leverages Apple's Neural Engine for on-device model inference, CoreML for vision and speech tasks, and the iOS Secure Enclave for quantum-safe key storage. Background agent operation is supported via Background App Refresh and Push-to-Sync. Distributed through the Apple App Store.

platforms.name: Raspberry Pi
platforms.description: HeadyOS is optimized for Raspberry Pi 4 and Pi 5, enabling sovereign AI nodes at the edge for under $100 hardware cost. The Pi build uses quantized INT4/INT8 model weights for memory-constrained inference, GPIO integration for IoT sensor pipelines, and can form mesh swarms with other Pi nodes using Heady's peer-to-peer agent bus.

minRequirements.device: Raspberry Pi 4 Model B (4 GB RAM) or Pi 5 (4 GB RAM)

platforms.name: Cloudflare Workers
platforms.description: HeadyOS deploys stateless agent execution to Cloudflare's global edge network via Workers runtime. The Workers build handles CSL gate evaluation, memory retrieval, and routing logic at 300+ edge locations worldwide, with Durable Objects providing stateful agent contexts and R2 for vector store replication. Achieves sub-10ms global p99 latency.
